name: Ysabel Jurado
party_affiliation: Democratic (also a member of Democratic Socialists of America)

top_contributors.name: Ben Davis
top_contributors.employer: ELDER LAW AND DISABILITY RIGHTS CENTER

campaign_promises: Stop the 'eviction to homelessness pipeline' with stronger renter protections
Pass rent control measures and establish a right to counsel in evictions
Implement stricter regulations on eviction practices
Invest in financial and relocation assistance programs for vulnerable tenants
Institute a vacancy tax on unrented/unused properties
Charge a speculation fee to property flippers
Deploy ULA (Universal Rent Assistance / Measure ULA) funds to keep seniors in affordable housing
Expand community land trusts with permanent affordability covenants
Leverage public lands for interim housing (Care First Village model)
Coordinate with Supervisor Solis on Skid Row homelessness solutions
Restore broken street lighting (roughly 70% of CD14 lights non-functional)
Reimagine public safety — skeptical of LAPD expansion given $300M+ liability claims
Increase multi-modal transportation in downtown and Boyle Heights
Reduce traffic fatalities in areas bordering freeways
campaign_platform.source_note: ysabeljurado.la currently redirects to Instagram (no active campaign site); platform drawn from LAist reporting and Wikipedia.
